content:
Building a modern web application doesn’t have to mean starting from scratch.

Over the past few years, the shadcn/ui ecosystem has grown into a rich collection of production-ready templates for SaaS products, dashboards, blogs, changelogs, restaurants, startup websites, and more.

Whether you’re launching a SaaS product, building an internal tool, creating a content platform, or validating a startup idea, choosing the right template can save hours of development time. It also gives you a polished, customizable foundation powered by technologies such as shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS, and Next.js.

In this guide, we’ll explore some of the best shadcn templates available in 2026, covering everything from open-source projects to premium starter kits.

TL;DR

Ink is the best overall shadcn template for blogs, documentation websites, and other content-focused platforms. It supports both Next.js and Astro.

Track is built for SaaS teams that need a polished changelog or release notes page without developing an update system from scratch.

Bistro is a restaurant-focused template with ready-made sections for menus, reservations, testimonials, and image galleries.

Shadcn Admin, with more than 12.4k GitHub stars, is one of the most popular open-source dashboard templates. It includes authentication pages, data tables, analytics components, and production-ready layouts.

Next Forge, with more than 9k stars, is a strong option for developers building production-grade SaaS applications that require scalable architecture and modern tooling.

Next Shadcn Dashboard Starter, with more than 6.6k stars, offers a clean and minimal foundation for SaaS dashboards, admin panels, and internal tools.

Shadcn Landing Page, with more than 1.9k stars, remains a popular open-source choice for building startup and SaaS marketing websites.

Mainline provides a complete SaaS landing page foundation with pricing tables, testimonials, FAQs, and conversion-focused sections.

Most modern shadcn templates now include Tailwind CSS v4, dark mode, responsive design, and support for the Next.js App Router out of the box.

Best 10 Free shadcn/ui Templates Reviewed

This article compares free shadcn/ui templates across different use cases rather than ranking them by popularity alone.

The selection covers blogs, changelogs, restaurant websites, admin dashboards, SaaS starters, startup landing pages, and production-ready application foundations.

Each template is highlighted for the specific type of project it handles best.

Quick Overview

Best Blog Template: Ink

Best Changelog Template: Track

Best Restaurant Template: Bistro

Best Admin Dashboard: Shadcn Admin

Best SaaS Dashboard Starter: Next Shadcn Dashboard Starter

Best Startup Landing Page: Shadcn Landing Page

Best Unique Design: Retro

Best SaaS Marketing Website: Mainline

Best Production-Ready Starter: Next Forge

The Shadcn ecosystem now offers templates for almost every use case. The right choice depends on what you’re building, but any of the options below can help you launch faster while maintaining the flexibility and developer experience that made Shadcn UI so popular.

Ink — shadcn/ui Blog and Content Template

Ink is a modern publishing shadcn/ui template built for developers, technical writers, documentation teams, and content-focused businesses. Powered by shadcn/ui, Astro, Tailwind CSS, and Next.js, it combines clean typography with distraction-free layouts designed to keep the reader’s attention on the content.

•
Website: https://shadcnstudio.com/templates/ink-blog-template-free

•
License: Free

•
Framework: Next.js, shadcn/ui, and Tailwind CSS

Key Features

• Clean homepage and individual article layouts

• Readable typography optimized for long-form content

• Built-in newsletter and subscription sections

• Responsive navigation across desktop and mobile devices

• SEO-friendly page and content structure

• Reusable and customizable shadcn/ui components

Unlike general-purpose blog starters, Ink places content presentation and readability at the center of its design. This makes it a strong foundation for publications that need a polished interface without unnecessary visual distractions.

Best for: Developer blogs, documentation websites, technical publications, content portals, and content-driven businesses.

Track — shadcn/ui Changelog Template

Track is a dedicated changelog and product-update shadcn UI template created for SaaS companies, product-led startups, and development teams. It provides a clear, professional way to publish releases, feature announcements, bug fixes, and ongoing product improvements.

•
Website: https://shadcnstudio.com/templates/track-changelog-template-free

•
License: Free

•
Framework: Next.js, shadcn/ui, and Tailwind CSS

Key Features

• Purpose-built changelog layouts

• Chronological product-release timelines

• Dedicated feature-announcement sections

• Reusable cards for updates and release entries

• Responsive layouts for desktop and mobile devices

• Conversion-focused call-to-action sections

A changelog is more than a list of technical updates. When presented well, it can demonstrate product momentum, improve transparency, and keep customers engaged with newly released features.

Track gives teams a polished foundation for turning routine product updates into a valuable communication and retention channel.

Best for: SaaS companies, startups, product teams, and developer-focused products.

Bistro — shadcn/ui Restaurant Landing Page

Bistro is a polished restaurant website template designed to help restaurants, cafés, food trucks, and other hospitality businesses establish a professional online presence quickly.

Built with Next.js, shadcn/ui, and Tailwind CSS, it combines modern visual design with practical, industry-specific sections that customers expect from a restaurant website.

•
Website: https://shadcnstudio.com/templates/bistro-restaurant-template-free

•
License: Free

•
Framework: Next.js, shadcn/ui, and Tailwind CSS

Key Features:

• Branded hero sections for highlighting the restaurant

• Structured layouts for showcasing menus and featured dishes

• Prominent reservation calls to action

• Customer testimonial sections

• Image galleries for food, interiors, and events

• Responsive layouts optimized for mobile devices

Unlike general-purpose landing page templates, Bistro includes the essential sections hospitality businesses need from the start. This reduces customization work and makes it easier to launch a visually appealing, customer-friendly website.

Best for: Restaurants, cafés, food trucks, delivery brands, and hospitality businesses.

Shadcn Admin by Sat Naing

Shadcn Admin by Sat Naing is one of the most widely adopted open-source dashboard templates in the shadcn/ui ecosystem. It provides a polished, production-ready admin interface that developers can fork, customize, and integrate into real-world applications.

•
Website: https://github.com/satnaing/shadcn-admin

•
GitHub Stars: 12.4k+

•
License: MIT

•
Framework: Next.js, shadcn/ui, and Tailwind CSS

Key Features

• Multiple dashboard layouts

• Ready-made authentication pages

• Responsive sidebar navigation

• Advanced data tables

• Integrated charts and analytics components

• User profile and settings screens

• Built-in dark mode support

Many dashboard starters provide little more than a basic overview page. Shadcn Admin goes further by including the pages, navigation patterns, and interface components commonly required in production applications.

Its broad feature set makes it a strong foundation for teams that want to avoid rebuilding standard admin functionality from scratch.

Best for: Admin panels, SaaS dashboards, CRM systems, analytics platforms, and internal business tools.

Next Forge:

Created by the Vercel team, Next Forge is an opinionated starter kit designed to help teams build scalable applications using modern best practices.

•
Website: https://www.next-forge.com/

•
GitHub Stars: 7.1k+

•
License: Open Source

•
Framework: Next.js

Features include:

• Production-ready architecture

• Authentication setup

• Developer tooling

• Scalable project structure

• Deployment-ready configuration

• Modern development workflows

Rather than focusing solely on UI, Next Forge helps teams build maintainable applications that scale as products grow.

Best for: Startups, SaaS companies, and production-grade applications.

Next Shadcn Dashboard Starter

Next Shadcn Dashboard Starter is one of the most popular open-source dashboard starters in the shadcn/ui ecosystem. It gives developers a clean, well-organized foundation for building SaaS products, admin interfaces, and modern business applications.

•
Website: https://github.com/Kiranism/next-shadcn-dashboard-starter

•
GitHub Stars: 6.6k+

•
License: MIT

•
Framework: Next.js, shadcn/ui, and Tailwind CSS

Key Features:

• Dashboard-ready page layouts

• Authentication support

• Responsive sidebar and navigation patterns

• Reusable shadcn/ui components

• Light and dark theme support

• Clean, extensible project architecture

One of the template’s biggest strengths is its simplicity. Rather than adding unnecessary abstractions or an oversized feature set, it provides the essential structure developers need to start building quickly.

This makes it especially useful for teams that want a flexible dashboard foundation they can extend according to their own product requirements.

Best for: SaaS products, admin dashboards, startup applications, and internal business tools.

Shadcn Landing Page

Shadcn Landing Page is a popular open-source marketing template built for startups, SaaS products, and online services. It includes the essential sections needed to present a product, communicate its value, and convert visitors into customers.

•
Website: https://shadcn-landing-page.vercel.app/

•
GitHub Stars: 1.9k+

•
License: MIT

•
Framework: React, shadcn/ui, and Tailwind CSS

Key Features

• Attention-grabbing hero sections

• Product and feature showcases

• Pricing tables

• Customer testimonials

• Frequently asked questions

• Contact and lead-generation forms

• Responsive layouts for desktop and mobile devices

The template follows modern SaaS design patterns while remaining flexible enough to support products across different industries. Its reusable sections make it easy to rearrange the page, customize the branding, and adapt the content to a specific audience.

Shadcn Landing Page is a practical choice for teams that need a polished marketing website without designing and developing every section from scratch.

Best for: SaaS landing pages, startup websites, product launches, and marketing websites.

Retro — Free Startup Template

Retro combines modern SaaS design patterns with distinctive, retro-inspired visual styling. It is designed for founders and developers who want a polished landing page that feels more memorable than the minimalist layouts commonly used across startup websites.

•
Website: https://www.easyui.pro/retro

•
License: Free

•
Framework: Next.js, shadcn/ui, and Tailwind CSS

Key Features:

• Startup-focused landing page layouts

• Distinctive retro-inspired visual identity

• Conversion-focused page structure

• Product and feature showcase sections

• Customer testimonials

• Responsive layouts across desktop and mobile devices

Retro’s greatest strength is its personality. While many SaaS templates rely on similar typography, gradients, and card-based layouts, Retro offers a more recognizable design without sacrificing usability or modern user experience principles.

It is a strong choice for teams that want to launch quickly while giving their product a visual identity that stands apart from typical SaaS websites.

Best for: Indie hackers, startups, product launches, creative tools, and personal projects.

Mainline — SaaS Landing Page Template

Mainline is an open-source SaaS website template designed for founders and developme
